## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Mar 15, 2026 - Apr 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Melanie_, Apr 15, 2026, 1/5: "I just got back from exercising and wanted to check something in the app, but the app does not start & closes again within 3 seconds after clicking on it. After trying 3 times it said to clear the cache & that there was a bug (I even force quit the app), but it still doesn't work. Please fix this. I've never experienced this before. Edit: I just reinstalled the app and had to reconnect the SAME phone again to use the QR code. It's better this doesn't happen again."
            2. _Avelino Luis_, Apr 15, 2026, 1/5: "I have a bug that is causing the app not to work, please fix it"
            3. _Isef Işıktan_, Mar 15, 2026, 4/5: "Please bring Streak Freeze to the app for people who go on holidays overseas. It is sad to see that my weeks streak lost just because I was unable to log in the club."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      2 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jun 20, 2026 - Jul 16, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Travingel RAW_, Jul 16, 2026, 1/5: "i just wanted to cancel my subscription and you force me to update the app in order to do so, only to remove it right after"
            2. _kaf_, Jun 20, 2026, 1/5: "you cannot end your subscription whenever you want. you have to pay them for a whole year. if you want a normal subscription that you can just say off whenever you want, then you have to pay then 10 extra euros per month.The subscription automatically renews 3 days earlier every month, meaning that you pay 13x per year! additionally the app is ugly and feels old. they also filled it with ai to the point that it annoys me to use it. the gym itself really depens on where you go, most are not good"
